title: Overseas merchandise trade datasets | Stats NZ
content:
## Overseas merchandise trade datasets
Download the latest overseas merchandise trade data, including HS10 by country datasets for imports and exports. This page includes historical data back to 2015.
- New Zealand port and apportioned gross weight datasets
- 2026 datasets for imports and exports
- Yearly datasets of imports and exports from 2015 onward
- Annual confidentiality review

## New Zealand port and apportioned gross weight datasets
The New Zealand port and apportioned gross weight datasets for the January 2015 to April 2026 months are available for download.
- January 2026 to April 2026 (zipped CSV, 9.53 MB) , datasets last updated 21 May 2026
- January 2025 to December 2025 (zipped CSV, 28.9 MB) , datasets last updated 20 February 2026
- January 2024 to December 2024 (zipped CSV, 28.3 MB) , datasets last updated 19 September 2025
- January 2023 to December 2023 (zipped CSV, 28.1 MB) , datasets last updated 19 September 2025
- January 2022 to December 2022 (zipped CSV, 28.2 MB) , datasets last updated 19 September 2025
- January 2021 to December 2021 (zipped CSV, 28.9 MB) , datasets last updated 19 September 2025
- January 2020 to December 2020 (zipped CSV, 27.7 MB) , datasets last updated 19 September 2025
- January 2019 to December 2019 (zipped CSV, 29.9 MB) , datasets last updated 19 September 2025
- January 2018 to December 2018 (zipped CSV, 29.8 MB) , datasets last updated 19 September 2025
- January 2017 to December 2017 (zipped CSV, 28.8 MB) , datasets last updated 19 September 2025
- January 2016 to December 2016 (zipped CSV, 27.9 MB) , datasets last updated 19 September 2025
- January 2015 to December 2015 (zipped CSV, 27.3 MB) , datasets last updated 19 September 2025

## Datasets for imports and exports
The datasets below contain all 10-digit Harmonised System (HS) codes traded in the specific month. They support the relevant monthly overseas merchandise trade information release, as well as the data already available on Infoshare .
If all you need is a selection of HS codes and/or country information, we recommend you use Infoshare for your data, rather than these very large datasets.
Four datasets are available for each month: HS10 values, and HS10 by country values, for both imports and exports.

### 2026 datasets for imports (provisional), updated 21 May 2026
- Apr 2026 imports HS10 (CSV, 1.47 MB)
- Apr 2026 imports HS10 by country (CSV, 9.80 MB)
- Mar 2026 imports HS10 (CSV, 1.50 MB)
- Mar 2026 imports HS10 by country (CSV, 10.3 MB)
- Feb 2026 imports HS10 (CSV, 1.46 MB)
- Feb 2026 imports HS10 by country (CSV, 9.78 MB)

### 2026 datasets for exports (provisional), updated 21 May 2026
- Apr 2026 exports HS10 (CSV, 1.01 MB)
- Apr 2026 exports HS10 by country (CSV, 4.26 MB)
- Mar 2026 exports HS10 (CSV, 1.05 MB)
- Mar 2026 exports HS10 by country (CSV, 4.45 MB)
- Feb 2026 exports HS10 (CSV, 1.01 MB)
- Feb 2026 exports HS10 by country (CSV, 4.09 MB)

### 2026 datasets for imports (final), updated 21 May 2026
- Jan 2026 imports HS10 (CSV, 1.41 MB)
- Jan 2026 imports HS10 by country (CSV, 9.23 MB)

### 2026 datasets for exports (final), updated 21 May 2026
- Jan 2026 exports HS10 (CSV, 0.88 MB)
- Jan 2026 exports HS10 by country (CSV, 3.30 MB)

Country data for the years 1990–2014 is available on request. Port data and country data for the years 2003–2014 is available on request. A cost recovery fee will be charged.

## Annual confidentiality review
The annual confidential review occurs in September of each year, and may result in confidentiality being lifted from selected HS codes for historical data. All files here will be updated when this occurs and this will be reflected in the date updated field.
We recommend that all users of overseas merchandise trade data should download and replace all the files in September, after the annual confidentiality review.
- These datasets support the relevant monthly overseas merchandise trade information release, as well as the data already available on Infoshare . For technical information regarding the data, please see the data quality section of the relevant release.
- All overseas merchandise trade data is provisional for three months, and is therefore subject to change until finalised on the fourth month.
- All confidential HS codes, or HS codes not traded for the month have been excluded.
- The import datasets contains value for duty (vfd) and cost, insurance and freight (cif) values, and quantities.
- The export datasets contains export free on board value (fob), and export quantities, re-export fob value and quantities, and total exports fob value and quantities.
- country of origin is used for imports, and country of destination is used for exports.
- Quantities are not applicable for all HS codes. Codes with no applicable quantity have the quantity fields blank.
Kilograms of tobacco content
Litres of motor spirit
Litres of pure alcohol
If you have any questions, please email overseastrade@stats.govt.nz .
Page updated 21 May 2026
